nasb.text: For, behold, the wicked bend the bow, They make ready their arrow upon the string To shoot in darkness at the upright in heart.

esv.text: for behold, the wicked bend the bow; they have fitted their arrow to the string to shoot in the dark at the upright in heart;

cnv.text: 看哪！惡人的弓已經拉開， 箭已經上弦， 要從暗處射那心裡正直的人。

ccb.text: 看啊，恶人弯弓搭箭， 要暗射心地正直的人。

csbs.text: 看哪，恶人拉开弓， 在弦上备好箭， 要在幽暗中射那心里正直的人！
